abilities.description: Add {C}{C}. Spend this mana only to activate abilities.
When you next activate an exhaust ability that isn't a mana ability this turn, copy it. You may choose new targets for the copy.

effect.description: When you next activate an exhaust ability that isn't a mana ability this turn, copy it. You may choose new targets for the copy.
effect.name: DelayedTrigger
